index.dreamWhisper2: There is no place for fear here.
index.dreamWhisper3: Your path has already been drawn.
index.coreText:
Not the first story.
Not the last.
index.weaverWhisper3: Let it pull you into the abyss. It's the only way to breathe.

dreamWorld.title: Dream World
dreamWorld.catPlaceholder: Searching for self on the moonlit rooftops…

world.pageTitle: The Root of All Things. Silence and Madness. - SunnyChimera
world.title:
THE ROOT OF ALL THINGS
Silence and Madness
world.keeperGreeting: Don't move. You're blocking my view of yesterday. Well? Why are you staring? Your thoughts have too much... echo. Say something already.
world.dryadGreeting: The Dryad is silent. Speak — the Keeper will answer.

lore.dreamBody: Observation and protection. Here you can write the character's story, role, and connection to the Dream World.
lore.dryadBody: Figure from world history. Write the character's story and role here.
lore.shinyBroBody: Character of the Weaver World. Write the character's story and role here.

chat.askKeeper: ASK THE KEEPER ABOUT YOUR ESSENCE

about.title: About - SunnyChimera
about.body: Write a few words about yourself and the project here.

cat.greeting: You always feel me, even with your back turned. Say something.

dream.greeting: If everything stopped, what would still remain true?

crystal.greeting: You don't have to prove anything to me. Let's just talk. What's actually happening behind that smile of yours?

liora.greeting: When did you last allow yourself to be small and safe?

shiny.greeting: What are you holding that should belong to me?

shinyBro.greeting: Who are you without the person you serve?

weaver.greeting: I'm Weaver. Say one thing you want so badly it scares you.

talkMushroom.greeting: What if the voice in your head isn't yours?

angryForest.greeting: Why are you disturbing my ground?
